title: Action node child-meta inline edit
goal: /practice/admin에서 action node의 action_type, location_id, duration_sec를 inline correction하고 local bundle row를 in-place replace
allowed_support_files: docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md, docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md(if new learning), docs/worker/MISTAKES.md(if needed)
phase4_order: npm run build -> npm run lint -> @self-reviewer -> npx tsc --noEmit
extra_changes_rule: session-start git status --short baseline 기준, write set + 허용 worker docs만 허용
truth_basis: actual code + docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md + approved TASK-110~148 truth
